title: Mark Zuckerberg Says AI Could Create More Jobs, Not Destroy Them, Despite Meta Layoffs
description: Mark Zuckerberg says Artificial Intelligence can create more jobs by boosting human productivity, even as Meta cuts 8,000 roles and ramps up investments in AI., Companies, Times Now
content: Just days after Meta issued layoff notices to around 8,000 employees, CEO Mark Zuckerberg has argued that concerns over artificial intelligence replacing large numbers of workers may be exaggerated. Instead of viewing AI as a force that will inevitab... [3153 chars]

title: What to tell your kids (and grandkids) in an AI world
description: Artificial intelligence can’t make something as beautiful as the drawings you scrawl on scrap paper with purple crayons.
content:
This is an opinion column.
It’s true what they say about being a grandparent. All of the joy. Less of the stress.
I don’t try to tell their parents how to raise them. I marvel at the job they do. I sit back and reap the benefits. And go home.
But the... [3768 chars]

title: AI Data Center Expansion Faces Grid Constraints as Power Demand Surges
description: The rapid expansion of artificial intelligence data centers is encountering a significant obstacle: insufficient capacity on electrical grids to support them. According to industry projections, AI-related infrastructure spending could exceed $5 trillion by 2030, with data center capacity demand reaching 100 gigawatts, according to McKinsey and JLL estimates cited by Charles Kennedy on OilPrice.com. Utilities […]

title: Delhi HC says public figures 'should not be thin-skinned, must tolerate satire'; orders removal of certain posts on Raghav Chadha
description: At the same time, Justice Subramonium Prasad clarified that the Court was not endorsing the misuse of artificial intelligence to generate deepfake videos, morphed images or similar content intended to damage an individual's dignity.
content:
